description_long: This is a rectangular, wall-mounted shelving unit made of light-colored wood, featuring a large open back panel with three rectangular cutouts of varying sizes. The front face has a deep shelf running horizontally near the bottom, divided into three open cubby compartments. The back view reveals additional structural supports and a central panel, likely for mounting stability. The sides are flat and unadorned, emphasizing the unit's boxy, modern design. The wood grain is visible throughout, giving it a natural, contemporary appearance suitable for urban interiors or garages. The open design allows for easy access and display of stored items, while the cutouts may accommodate cables or wall fixtures.
description: A light wood, wall-mounted shelving unit with three open cubbies and rectangular cutouts on the back panel. Its modern, open design is ideal for displaying or organizing items in urban spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing three open cubby compartments and rectangular cutouts on the back panel.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the flat, unadorned thickness of the shelving unit.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing mounting supports, a central panel, and the arrangement of cutouts.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the flat profile of the unit.
